ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chemicals" (
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical */,
  "chemical_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical */,
  "synonyms" TEXT /* Synonyms or alternative names for the chemical */,
  "cas_no" TEXT /* CAS number of the chemical */,
  "trade_secret" INTEGER /* Indicates if the chemical is a trade secret */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the chemical */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the chemical */,
  "solubility" TEXT /* Solubility in water and other solvents */,
  "melting_point" REAL /* Melting point of the chemical */,
  "boiling_point" REAL /* Boiling point of the chemical */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the chemical */,
  "appearance" TEXT /* Physical appearance of the chemical */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the chemical record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formulations" (
  "formulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each formulation */,
  "formulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the formulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the formulation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the formulation was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the formulation record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the formulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formulation_chemicals" (
  "formulation_chemical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each formulation-chemical combination */,
  "formulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the formulation */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical */,
  "weight_percent" REAL /* Weight percentage of the chemical in the formulation */,
  "min_concentration" REAL /* Minimum allowable concentration of the chemical in the formulation */,
  "max_concentration" REAL /* Maximum allowable concentration of the chemical in the formulation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the formulation-chemical record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formulation_chemical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formulation_chemicals_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formulation_chemicals_formulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("formulation_id") REFERENCES formulations ("formulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_data_sheets" (
  "sds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety data sheet */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical */,
  "handling_procedures" TEXT /* Handling procedures for the chemical */,
  "storage_procedures" TEXT /* Storage procedures for the chemical */,
  "emergency_procedures" TEXT /* Emergency procedures for the chemical */,
  "physical_and_chemical_properties" TEXT /* Physical and chemical properties of the chemical */,
  "stability_and_reactivity" TEXT /* Stability and reactivity information */,
  "ecological_information" TEXT /* Ecological information */,
  "disposal_considerations" TEXT /* Disposal considerations */,
  "transport_information" TEXT /* Transport information */,
  "other_information" TEXT /* Other relevant information */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the SDS record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_data_sheets_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hazard_classifications" (
  "hazard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hazard classification */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical */,
  "hazard_class" TEXT /* Hazard class of the chemical (e.g., flammable, toxic) */,
  "hazard_description" TEXT /* Description of the hazard */,
  "signal_word" TEXT /* Signal word (e.g., Danger, Warning) */,
  "hazard_pictogram" TEXT /* Hazard pictogram */,
  "hazard_statements" TEXT /* Hazard statements */,
  "precautionary_statements" TEXT /* Precautionary statements */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the hazard classification record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hazard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hazard_classifications_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_classifications" (
  "regulatory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory classification */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical */,
  "regulatory_class" TEXT /* Regulatory class of the chemical (e.g., REACH, OSHA) */,
  "regulatory_description" TEXT /* Description of the regulatory classification */,
  "regulatory_agency" TEXT /* Regulatory agency (e.g., EPA, FDA) */,
  "regulatory_code" TEXT /* Regulatory code or standard */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the regulatory classification record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulatory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_classifications_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, safety officer, regulatory specialist) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "synergistic_effects" (
  "synergistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synergistic effect */,
  "chemical_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first chemical */,
  "chemical_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second chemical */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Description of the synergistic effect */,
  "synergy_type" TEXT /* Type of synergistic effect (e.g., increased reactivity, enhanced toxicity) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the synergistic effect record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("synergistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_synergistic_effects_chemical_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id_1") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_synergistic_effects_chemical_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id_2") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incompatibilities" (
  "incompatibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incompatibility */,
  "chemical_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first chemical */,
  "chemical_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second chemical */,
  "incompatibility_description" TEXT /* Description of the incompatibility */,
  "incompatibility_type" TEXT /* Type of incompatibility (e.g., reactive, toxic) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the incompatibility record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incompatibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incompatibilities_chemical_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id_1") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incompatibilities_chemical_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id_2") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_hazards" (
  "environmental_hazard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental hazard */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical */,
  "hazard_description" TEXT /* Description of the environmental hazard */,
  "hazard_type" TEXT /* Type of environmental hazard (e.g., aquatic toxicity, biodegradability) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the environmental hazard record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environmental_hazard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_hazards_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ems" (
  "ems_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency contact */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact name */,
  "emergency_phone" TEXT /* Emergency contact phone number */,
  "emergency_email" TEXT /* Emergency contact email */,
  "emergency_address" TEXT /* Emergency contact address */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the emergency contact record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ems_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ems_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)
